<ruby>第<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>三<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sān</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>营<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>撕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>裂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>蒙<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ménɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>灰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huī</rt></ruby><ruby>尘<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>伏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">叩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kòu</rt></ruby><ruby>拜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bài</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>？”<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>营<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>逃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">táo</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shì</rt></ruby><ruby>情<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qinɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>怎<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zěn</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby>？<ruby>请<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Qǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>告<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡào</rt></ruby><ruby>诉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">su</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>百<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>姓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>阵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhèn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>逃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">táo</rt></ruby><ruby>跑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pǎo</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>许<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>亡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>单<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dān</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>报<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bào</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>少<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shào</rt></ruby><ruby>年<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nián</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>怎<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zěn</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>单<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dān</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ne</rt></ruby>？”

<ruby>报<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bào</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>少<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shào</rt></ruby><ruby>年<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nián</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>偶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>然<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rán</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>波<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bō</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>伏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>枪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>战<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>车<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chē</rt></ruby>、<ruby>马<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>兵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>紧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jǐn</rt></ruby><ruby>紧<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jǐn</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>追<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuī</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>呼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hū</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>？”<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>玛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>力<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>请<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Qǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>痛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>苦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>抓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuā</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>尚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>存<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cún</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>准<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔn</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huó</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qù</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tóu</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>冠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuān</rt></ruby><ruby>冕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miǎn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>臂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">镯<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhuó</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>撕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>裂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>跟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡēn</rt></ruby><ruby>随<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suí</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>而<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Ér</rt></ruby><ruby>且<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiě</rt></ruby><ruby>悲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bēi</rt></ruby><ruby>哀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">āi</rt></ruby>、<ruby>哭<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kū</rt></ruby><ruby>号<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">háo</rt></ruby>、<ruby>禁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>食<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>晚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>单<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>华<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huá</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>民<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mín</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>刀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dāo</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xià</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>色<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sè</rt></ruby><ruby>列<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>民<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mín</rt></ruby><ruby>秉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>公<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>义<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>扫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Sǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luó</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>巴<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>巴<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bā</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mɑ</rt></ruby>？”<ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Pú</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby>。”
